hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import os, json
state_file = 'results/reports/.session_state.json'
if os.path.exists(state_file):
    with open(state_file) as f:
        state = json.load(f)
    last = state.get('last_action', '')
    loop = state.get('loop_iteration', 0)
    metric = state.get('best_metric', 'unknown')
    stall = state.get('stall_count', 0)
    if last:
        print(f'[session] resuming loop iteration {loop} — last: {last} — best metric: {metric}')
        if stall >= 2:
            print(f'[session] WARNING: {stall} consecutive loops with no improvement — escalation may be needed')
        dont = state.get('do_not_retry', [])
        if dont:
            print('[session] do NOT retry:')
            for d in dont[:3]:
                print(f'  - {d}')
"

python3 -c "
import sys, json
try:
    inp = json.load(sys.stdin)
except:
    sys.exit(0)
url = inp.get('tool_input', {}).get('url', '')
allowed = ['api.semanticscholar.org', 'export.arxiv.org', 'arxiv.org', 'ar5iv.labs.arxiv.org', 'github.com', 'raw.githubusercontent.com', 'api.search.brave.com', 'huggingface.co', 'paperswithcode.com', 'api.openalex.org']
from urllib.parse import urlparse
domain = urlparse(url).netloc.lower()
if not any(domain.endswith(d) for d in allowed):
    print(f'[research-os] WebFetch blocked: {domain}', file=sys.stderr)
    sys.exit(2)
sys.exit(0)
"

CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep '\.py$' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -n "$CHANGED" ] && command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1 && ruff check --fix $CHANGED 2>/dev/null || true; [ -n "$CHANGED" ] && command -v black >/dev/null 2>&1 && black $CHANGED 2>/dev/null || true
